patterns.reason: _escape_xpath_string() is used to sanitize all user input before XPath construction. The functions _find_element_by_exact_text and _try_direct_tap both call this escape function.
_execute_command does NOT use eval(). It parses commands with strict regex and only calls whitelisted Appium API methods.
_find_element_by_exact_text and _try_direct_tap now batch all searches into a single XPath query with OR conditions. See 'Batch all texts into single XPath query' comment at line 1199.
print() statements have been replaced with logging.warning() calls. See imports at top of file.
adb screencap error now includes stderr in the error message. See line 1786.
